Facts.

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: This may get downvoted to oblivion but at least I tried and remembered before September!!
item.description:
Teachers, keep reading. (Sorry)
By “wishlist” I meant your AMAZON wishlist, not your literal wish list. Sorry, this was my bad. Also if you see on my wishlist that there’s a wireless keyboard and monitor it’s cause I gotta use a laptop at work now and my 44year old hands and eyeballs won’t be happy with that. Just in case you thought I was trying to jack up my gaming system (I already have a big screen and wireless keyboard at home, monitor a gift from my deceased cousin and keyboard I got on sale.)
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: Grab ‘em…
item.description: That’s my governor

item.title: Mother and child with poliosis, A hereditary white streak in their hair
item.dc:creator: Greatermarts

item.title: Images of Note: Right now!
item.description:
Who gets up before 6am to get some shoes
I wish this was a joke.
ANSWER THE QUESTION!
p u n t
This is bringing me images of joy.
Baaa!
*plap plap plap plap plap plap plap plap* two rollerballs please.
f o r b i d d e n o h i o.
Can we just fucking talk about that for a second?
fuck you, hyperfixate on salamanca
TEACH. YOUR KIDS. INTERNET SAFETY.
behold, the gayest thing you have seen today.
Gouge your eyes of pussies.
We're calling out Shane fans here.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Some of my favourite memes from the last quarter
item.description:
My personal favourite Simpsons episode
Professor X is cold mofo
Bit of context last Australian summer Pakistan cricket team let themselves down royally by dropping lots of catches in otherwise a pretty competitive test series
The continuing hilarious case of South Africa's inability to get past the semi finals of the cricket World Cup
Haven't read the book but I presume the big problem was not enough people in the Gulag.

item.title: It’s time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
how can she resist?
i would die for juanita
usual sleepover outfit
not a big sushi guy unless it's shrimp tempura rolls (i know, not really sushi)
imgur is incredibly nice. thanks
i like her
epic family
i have no idea what that is supposed to mean
1 stop shopping
fucking jealous
is there any other kind of pool?
accurate
ok..
it's always performance art
that's 8 pictures, sir
mmm hmm
that's all for me, have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Lazy skies 57 by Spoonyoogie
item.description: Their comics are posted on https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/117912566 Their instagram is mostly silly pictures of their cat: https://www.instagram.com/spoogyoogie "the decision to stop uploading here was partly because i don't really want to advertise that i have a patreon anymore, i just feel bad about asking for money" https://www.patreon.com/spoogyoogie #comic #spoogyoogie #cute #sister #kid
